items.titolo: Nvidia lobbies White House and wins loosened AI GPU export control to China — U.S. lawmakers reportedly reject GAIN AI Act
items.descrizione: The U.S. House shelved the GAIN AI Act, blocking a rule that would have forced AMD and Nvidia to put U.S. buyers ahead of China for advanced GPUs, though Beijing's own limits blunt the impact.

items.titolo: Micron is killing Crucial SSDs and memory in AI pivot — company refocuses on HBM and enterprise customers
